zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Ann Croxton於1462年出生在英國貝德福爾肯普斯頓時，她的父親William Croxton36歲，母親Alice DeMulton27歲。她於1493年與Sir John William Nicholas de Carter在英國亨廷格多史爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年在她的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Ann Croxton于1462年出生在英国貝德福爾肯普斯頓时，她的父亲William Croxton36岁，母亲Alice DeMulton27岁。她于1493年与Sir John William Nicholas de Carter在英国亨廷格多史爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1525年在她的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Croxton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Norfolk, and Staffordshire named Croxton, from the Old Norse personal name Krókr (see Crook 3) or an Old English word crōc ‘nook’ + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

variants.name: Crowston
meanings: English: habitational name from South Croxton or Croxton Kerrial (Leicestershire), traditionally pronounced /'krousən/; or possibly from a village so named in Lincolnshire. Compare   Croxton  .

variants.name: Crook
meanings: topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

variants.name: Croston
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire named Croston, from Old Norse kross ‘cross’ or Old English cros + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.
English: occasionally, a variant of   Croxton   or   Croson  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Ann Croxton was born in 1462, in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, her father, William Croxton, was 36 and her mother, Alice DeMulton, was 27. She married Sir John William Nicholas de Carter in 1493, in Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1525, in her hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Ann Croxton est née en 1462, à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Croxton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice DeMulton, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John William Nicholas de Carter en 1493, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1525, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Ann Croxton 1462 in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Croxton 36 und ihre Mutter Alice DeMulton 27. it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ann Croxton è nata il nel 1462 nel Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, William Croxton, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Alice DeMulton, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John William Nicholas de Carter nel 1493, nel Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1525, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Ann Croxtonが1462年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンで生まれた時，父William Croxtonは36歳，母Alice DeMultonは27歳であった。1493年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアでSir John William Nicholas de Carterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.St Stephen, Hertfordshire, England: 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스 스트 스티븐
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Ann Croxton(이)가 1462년 영국 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Croxton(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice DeMulton(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1493년 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 Sir John William Nicholas de Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ann Croxton nasceu em 1462, em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Croxton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice DeMulton, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John William Nicholas de Carter em 1493, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1525, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.St Stephen, Hertfordshire, England: ст албанс ст стифен, хиртфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Ann Croxton родилась в 1462 г. в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Croxton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice DeMulton, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John William Nicholas de Carter в 1493 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1525 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

Se casó con Sir John William Nicholas de Carter en 1493, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1525, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
